title: Hornet Removal in Hicksville, NY | $350–$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Hicksville, Long Island. Safe nest elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350–$550 service!
intro: Hornets pose serious risks to Hicksville residents and businesses with their aggressive behavior and painful stings. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Hicksville and surrounding Long Island communities. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential properties, commercial buildings, and outdoor spaces.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Hicksville with licensed, insured technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of Long Island properties. We offer same-day service, safe removal methods that protect your family and pets, and competitive pricing with our $350–$550 hornet removal service.
localContext: Hicksville's mix of established single-family homes near the LIRR station, garden apartments along Old Country Road, and commercial properties around Broadway create numerous environments where hornets build nests in eaves, trees, and wall voids. The area's mature landscaping and proximity to parks like Cantiague Park provide ideal conditions for hornet activity, making professional removal essential for property safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Hicksville. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. Emergency situations involving nests near entrances or high-traffic areas receive priority scheduling to ensure your safety.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350–$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection to locate all nests, safe removal using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, nest elimination, treatment of the area to prevent return, and a follow-up inspection if needed. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and the number of nests present on your property.

faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous, and when should I call for removal?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets are aggressive and can sting multiple times, causing severe reactions in some individuals. You should call immediately if you notice hornet activity near doorways, windows, or outdoor living spaces, if you discover a visible nest, or if family members are allergic to stings. Never attempt DIY removal as this often provokes mass attacks.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential and commercial properties in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide hornet removal for single-family homes, apartment complexes, retail stores along Broadway, office buildings, schools, and all commercial properties throughout Hicksville and the greater Long Island area. Our technicians are equipped to handle nests at any height or location on your property safely.
